'''Jim Thomas''' is an author. He wrote the young readers books ''[[Luke's Fate]]''<ref name="Luke's Fate" /> and ''[[Dangers of the Core]]''.<ref name="Dangers of the Core">''[[Dangers of the Core]]''</ref>
